name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, state, messages, coordinator
State == {"Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted"}

(* Message types *)
Message == [type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"},
            from \in participants \cup {coordinator},
            to \in participants \cup {coordinator}]

(* Initial state: all participants are in "Init" state, no messages in transit *)
Init == /\ participants = {1, 2, ..., N}
       /\ state = [p \in participants |-> "Init"]
       /\ messages = {}
       /\ coordinator \in participants

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ /\ messages = {}
      /\ \E p \in participants :
           /\ state[p] = "Init"
           /\ messages' = messages \cup { [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> coordinator, to |-> p] }
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Prepared"]
      /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ /\ \E p \in participants :
           /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
           /\ messages = { [type |-> "VoteYes", from |-> p, to |-> coordinator] }
           /\ state' = state
           /\ messages' = {}
      /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ /\ \E p \in participants :
           /\ state[p] = "Prepared"
           /\ messages = { [type |-> "VoteNo", from |-> p, to |-> coordinator] }
           /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "Aborted"]
           /\ messages' = {}
      /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ /\ \E p \in participants :
           /\ state[p] = "Committed"
           /\ messages = { [type |-> "Commit", from |-> coordinator, to |-> p] }
           /\ state' = state
           /\ messages' = {}
      /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>
  \/ /\ \E p \in participants :
           /\ state[p] = "Aborted"
           /\ messages = { [type |-> "Abort", from |-> coordinator, to |-> p] }
           /\ state' = state
           /\ messages' = {}
      /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator>>

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, state, messages, coordinator>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ participants \subseteq Nat
          /\ state \in [participants -> State]
          /\ messages \subseteq [type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"},
                                 from \in participants \cup {coordinator},
                                 to \in participants \cup {coordinator}]
          /\ coordinator \in participants

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, NULL

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a mapping from fork indices to philosopher indices or NULL *)
(* states: a mapping from philosopher indices to their state: "thinking", "hungry", "eating" *)

TypeOK == 
  /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {NULL}]
  /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Init == 
  /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
  /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == 
  \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "thinking"
     /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
     /\ forks' = forks
  \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks and starts eating *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "hungry"
     /\ forks[i] = NULL
     /\ forks[(i \mod N) + 1] = NULL
     /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
     /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![(i \mod N) + 1] = i]
  \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks and starts thinking *)
     /\ \E i \in 1..N : states[i] = "eating"
     /\ forks[i] = i
     /\ forks[(i \mod N) + 1] = i
     /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
     /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = NULL, ![(i \mod N) + 1] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N

VARIABLES num, flag


   variables
      num: [1..N -> Nat] init [i \in 1..N |-> 0];
      flag: [1..N -> BOOLEAN] init [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE];
   actions
      choose(i) == /\ flag[i] = FALSE
                 /\ flag[i] := TRUE
                 /\ num[i] := 1 + Max(num)
                 /\ flag[i] := FALSE
      enter(i) == /\ flag[i] = FALSE
                 /\ flag[i] := TRUE
                 /\ num[i] := 1 + Max(num)
                 /\ flag[i] := FALSE
      exit(i) == /\ flag[i] = FALSE
                 /\ flag[i] := TRUE
                 /\ num[i] := 0
                 /\ flag[i] := FALSE
   next == \E i \in 1..N : choose(i) \/ enter(i) \/ exit(i)
   invariant == \A i, j \in 1..N : i /= j => (num[i] = 0 \/ num[j] = 0 \/ num[i] > num[j] \/ (num[i] = num[j] /\ i > j))
   spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
   typeOK == /\ num \in [1..N -> Nat]
             /\ flag \in [1..N -> BOOLEAN]
   init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
           /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]
   next == \E i \in 1..N : choose(i) \/ enter(i) \/ exit(i)
   spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars
   INVARIANT TypeOK
   ==]

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>> \\
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
          /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \notin readers \\
          /\ r' = r \\
             /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
             /\ readers' = Append(readers, r) \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = TRUE \\
                /\ readers' = <<>> \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = Tail(readers) \\
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE \\
             /\ \E r \in 1..10 : /\ r \in readers \\
             /\ r' = r \\
                /\ writer_active' = FALSE \\
                /\ readers' = Tail(readers)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channelState, retransmitCount, sentChunks, fileChunks

Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> i]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> 0]
    /\ channelState = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> TRUE]

Next ==
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ retransmitCount[i] < MAX_RETRIES
        /\ channelState[i] = TRUE
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ retransmitCount' = [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = FALSE
        /\ channelState' = [channelState EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
    \/ \E i \in 1..FILE_SIZE :
        /\ i \in sentChunks
        /\ channelState[i] = TRUE
        /\ channelState' = channelState

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<channelState, retransmitCount, sentChunks>>
